title: Add Author Section to README
description: Update the project's README.md file to include an 'Author' section with the relevant author information.
details: Open the README.md file in the project root. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a logical position if a convention exists), and include the author's name and any relevant contact or profile information as per project standards. Ensure the formatting matches the rest of the README (e.g., use Markdown headings and consistent style).
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md file to confirm the 'Author' section is present, correctly formatted, and contains accurate information. Optionally, preview the Markdown rendering to ensure visual consistency.
